product.name: ArShirt
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
descriptions: 220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Pique, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric %100 cotton pique workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness.
ArShirt fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color.
Vat dyed ArShirt products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area.
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: categorySourceGroup: 'High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets'
matches.rationale: The product is explicitly categorized under the hi-vis warp knit fabric category, intended for safety jackets, with the hi-vis property directly stated.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Description states the fabric 'can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area', but this is a generic boilerplate statement without specific tactical, uniform, or service-specific application detail.
